headline: Gold miners slide sharply as bullion extends steep losses on rate fears
summary: Investing.com -- Shares in gold mining companies fell sharply on Monday as bullion dropped to a four-month low, extending steep losses from last week amid escalating Middle East tensions that have fueled inflation concerns and shifted expectations toward higher global interest rates.

content.title: Gold miners slide sharply as bullion extends steep losses on rate fears
